name_en: New Arrival Logo Print Half Moon Bag. Super cute mini handbag. Large leather logo with calfskin trim, fabric lining. Handheld, shoulder, or crossbody. Adjustable/removable strap, min 40cm max 50cm. Compact yet spacious, essential for street style. 1 main zip compartment. Model: 10K642. Dimensions: 18 *12.5 *6
